title: Run
description: A concrete execution of an Eval. A Run carries timing, status, the count of Trials it expects to produce, a free-form summary block, and a pointer into the WAL journal that is the source of truth for resumption (research/12 §2.6).

eval_ref.description: Reference to the Eval this Run executes.

finished_at.description: Set when status moves into a terminal state.

status.description: Run lifecycle status. `budget-exceeded` is distinct from `failed` so callers can distinguish capacity exhaustion from logic errors.

trial_count.description: Total number of Trials produced (or expected) by this Run.

summary.description: Aggregate metrics, top-line scores, cost totals, scorer breakdowns. Open by design — the harness writes whatever's useful for the chosen reporter.

wal_uri.description: URI to the append-only WAL journal for this Run. Local default: `file:///path/runs/<id>/run.wal`. The WAL is the source of truth; `replay` and `resume` operate against it.

otlp_trace_id.description: OpenTelemetry trace ID (32 hex chars) for the root Run span. Optional but recommended; required for `insect ingest --otlp` round-trip.

baseline_run_id.description: Optional pointer to a prior Run that this Run is being compared against (used by `insect diff`).
